ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance category */,
  "weightage" TEXT /* Weightage of the performance category in the overall score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the school (KG, Elementary, Middle, High) */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance score */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance category */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "performance_score" TEXT /* Performance score (e.g., Good, Acceptable) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments for the performance score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES performance_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "self_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each self-evaluation */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the self-evaluation */,
  "improvement_plan" TEXT /* Improvement plan based on the evaluation */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Implementation status of the improvement plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_self_evaluation_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_communication" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of communication (e.g., newsletter, meeting) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the communication */,
  "parent_response" TEXT /* Response from parents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parent_communication_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governance" (
  "governance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governance policy */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the governance policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the governance policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the governance policy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff management plan */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "staffing_plan" TEXT /* Staffing plan for the school */,
  "facility_maintenance" TEXT /* Facility maintenance plan */,
  "resource_allocation" TEXT /* Resource allocation plan */,
  "staff_training" TEXT /* Staff training plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_management_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the performance report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, parent) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the user is associated with */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the user (e.g., principal, teacher, parent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user (e.g., view report, update score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "performance_score" TEXT /* Performance score of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher evaluation */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the teacher evaluation */,
  "evaluation_score" TEXT /* Evaluation score of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)
